/opt/rh/gcc-toolset-13/root/usr/bin/c++  -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS  -fPIC -std=gnu++17 -Werror -Wno-covered-switch-default -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/LinearLayout.dir/LayoutUtilsTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LinearLayout.dir/LinearLayoutTest.cpp.o ../../lib/Tools/CMakeFiles/TritonTools.dir/GenericSwizzling.cpp.o ../../lib/Tools/CMakeFiles/TritonTools.dir/LayoutUtils.cpp.o ../../lib/Tools/CMakeFiles/TritonTools.dir/LinearLayout.cpp.o ../../lib/Tools/CMakeFiles/TritonTools.dir/PluginUtils.cpp.o ../../third_party/f2reduce/CMakeFiles/f2reduce.dir/f2reduce.cpp.o -o LinearLayout  -lstdc++fs ../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../lib/libgmock.a ../../lib/libgtest.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRLLVMDialect.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRControlFlowInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRDataLayoutInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRFunctionInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRCallInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRInferIntRangeInterface.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRInferTypeOpInterface.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRMemorySlotInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRPtrMemorySpaceInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRSideEffectInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRIR.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRSupport.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMCore.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMBinaryFormat.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMTargetParser.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMRemarks.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMBitstreamReader.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMSupport.a -lrt -ldl -lpthread -lm /usr/lib64/libz.so /usr/lib64/libzstd.so /usr/local/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a -lstdc++fs
